title: Zyliss Comfort Pro Santoku Knife, 18 cm/7 Inch, Forged German Stainless Steel, Antibacterial Black Handle with Finger Rest, Professional Kitchen Knife/Vegetable Knife/Sushi Knife, Dishwasher Safe
features: GERMAN STAINLESS STEEL - Forged from German Stainless Steel, with a sharp 15° taper-ground cutting edge, this all-purpose Japanese Santoku knife delivers superior cutting performance that lasts.
STAYS SHARPER LONGER - The blade is ice-hardened for enhanced edge retention so the knife stays sharper for longer and offers higher resistance to corrosion and dulling

ERGONOMIC DESIGN - A full tang construction means the knife is shaped and weighted for optimum balance. Designed to fit any hand size and grip style, the handle features an ergonomic tapered bolster with a flat finger rest on the spine for precise and comfortable use
ANTI-BACTERIAL HANDLE - With a rust and corrosion resistant blade and anti-bacterial handle, this knife cleans up easily in the dishwasher
25 YEAR GUARANTEE - Backed by professional-grade craftsmanship, this knife comes with a 25 year guarantee
description: From the manufacturer Designed to delight With over 70 years of experience designing high-end tools, utensils and gadgets for food preparation, it's easy to see how Zyliss has become an internationally respected brand favored by everyday cooks and gourmet chefs. Zyliss now boasts an eye-catching and distinctive portfolio of carefully designed and lovingly constructed kitchen utensils. Comfort Pro Range Kitchen Knives Take the effort out of food preparation Designed with professionals in mind, Zyliss Comfort Pro knives are built to last and provide the ultimate cutting experience. Featuring a super-sharp high performance 15° taper ground German stainless steel blade, these knives can withstand even the toughest of produce and the ice-hardened blade is proven to retain its cutting edge, staying sharper for longer High quality German stainless steel blade Ice hardened blade stays shraper for longer Ergonomic, comfort grip Full tang construction for optimal balance Control touchpoints for precision Dishwasher safe Superior cutting performance Forged from German Stainless Steel, with a sharp 15° taper-ground cutting edge, Comfort Pro knives deliver superior cutting performance that lasts. Ultimate comfort and agility A full tang construction means the knife is shaped and weighted for optimum balance. Designed to fit any hand size and grip style, the handle features an ergonomic tapered bolster with a flat finger rest on the spine for precise and comfortable use. Stays sharper For longer The blade is ice-hardened for enhanced edge retention so the knife stays sharper for longer and offers higher resistance to corrosion and dulling. Dishwasher safe With a rust and corrosion resistant blade and anti bacterial handle, this knife cleans up easily in the dishwasher. Discover our entire range of Comfort Pro Knives!
